meanings.low: Low wellness curiosity, lower interest in experimentation, learning, or trying new approaches.
meanings.medium: Moderate openness to wellness ideas; may try new approaches selectively.
meanings.high: High curiosity, exploration, learning orientation, and openness to wellness change.

meanings.low: Lower planning, structure, follow-through, and self-regulation in wellness contexts.
meanings.medium: Moderate planning and consistency; may follow routines when conditions are supportive.
meanings.high: High structure, planning, follow-through, consistency, and self-regulation in wellness.

meanings.low: Lower social energy and lower preference for social or externally stimulating wellness activities.
meanings.medium: Moderate social wellness preference; may enjoy some shared activities but not depend on them.
meanings.high: High social energy, activity drive, expression, accountability, and group-based motivation.

meanings.low: Lower tendency toward cooperation, accommodation, feedback receptiveness, and support in wellness settings.
meanings.medium: Moderate cooperation and supportiveness; may adapt when context or people matter.
meanings.high: High cooperation, empathy, harmony, supportiveness, and receptiveness in wellness contexts.

meanings.low: Low emotional reactivity, worry, stress disruption, and setback sensitivity in wellness contexts.
meanings.medium: Moderate emotional reactivity; stress or setbacks may affect wellness behaviour sometimes.
meanings.high: High emotional reactivity, worry, stress sensitivity, and vulnerability to wellness disruption.
